PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Aug-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: ERNEST DER, APPEARING FOR AND WITH PETITIONER

COUNSEL STATES THAT THE BOND WAS NOT FILED, BUT THAT HE WOULD FILE A $394,000.00 BOND TODAY. COUNSEL ALSO STATES THAT THE PETITIONER IS AWARE THAT SHE DID TAKE FEES BEFORE THAT THE COURT HAD APPROVED THEM AND THAT IN THE FUTURE THAT WOULD NOT HAPPEN. AND THAT THERE WOULD BE NO MORE GIFTS. THE MATTER WAS GRANTED.

JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN; REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN, CSR#11722; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; BALIFF:S. OBI
